THE MONTHLY RENT OF $403 IS TO BE PAID ON A TIMELY BASIS. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. 2000SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE DISTRIBUTE PER LAW. BOTH SIDES WAIVE CLAIMS TO HOSPITALITY. VACATE COURT TRIAL OF 10/22/01 RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. (503B)
